title: DestRelativeY Property
description:
For the straight line trajectory, this property sets a moving amount to Y direction in the coordinate system which is specified by ForceOrient and RobotLocal of force guide sequence.

This property is used when Straight is specified by ProbeTrajectory property.

Values

Minimum value -2000

Maximum value 2000

Default:  0

See Also: DestRelativeY Property

DestRelativeX Property

DestRelativeZ Property
see_also:
Applies To

FollowMove Object, PressProbe Object, Contact Probe Object, PressMove Object
